findings.finding: No canonical AGENTS.md existed at the workspace wrapper or the app Git root.
findings.impact: Cold Codex/default agents may not receive repo-specific operating guidance.

findings.finding: Package scripts existed but there was no machine-readable command registry.
findings.impact: Agents must infer cwd, package manager, safety class, and env requirements.

findings.finding: Database, deploy, secrets, auth, AI-spend, cron, and desktop launcher risks were real but uncatalogued.
findings.impact: Agents may run risky commands or touch sensitive paths without approval boundaries.

findings.finding: Test, lint, and build commands existed, but no authoritative matrix mapped checks to change types.
findings.impact: Agents may under-verify high-risk changes or over-run irrelevant checks.

findings.finding: Recovery notes and gotchas were scattered across README, src/server/README.md, and handoff docs.
findings.impact: Agents may rediscover known Vercel dev, build, test, and DB failure modes.

negative_recommendations: Do not duplicate full guidance across AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and CODEX.md.
Do not store secrets or summarize values from local env files.
Do not add repo-local skills yet.
post_implementation_validation: All ADX JSON files parsed with python3 -m json.tool.
adx_doctor.py --root . --json reported no findings and no unknown verification command references.
